prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document provides epidemiological data and analysis of enteric fever cases specifically reported in England, Wales and Northern Ireland for the year 2023. It details case definitions, data sources, trends, and geographical distribution which directly relate to public health in England.
